title: Project foundation must live in WAI state for reliable cold starts
signal: The hub now records project identity, scope boundaries, success criteria, workflow, and collaboration philosophy directly in WAI-State.json. This turns previously implicit context into durable state so new agents can resume accurately without relying on prior conversation memory.
rationale: Foundation gaps create cold-start drift and inconsistent decisions. Storing the project foundation in state makes wakeup and closeout more reliable across agents and sessions.
decision_reason: Category: other. Impact: 8/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
